notes: Workday for Slack notifications (recruiting requisitions, time-off / overtime approvals). Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Requisition card = header + a role/team section + section(fields) for Req ID/Location/Level/Openings/Start/Status, optionally with an 'Open in Workday' button accessory. Overtime/approval cards end with a *Pending Approval* status + an approver + a deadline — leave unanswered to stage a pending-approval beat. Fits manager/ops/approvals channels.

examples.name: requisition_approved
examples.when: A headcount requisition is approved and ready to post; discussed by managers.

text.text:
*Senior Site Reliability Engineer*
OneTech — Platform & SRE

elements.text: Workday Recruiting · Backfill for Plano SRE headcount · Hiring manager unassigned

examples.name: overtime_request_pending
examples.when: An overtime request is routed to a manager for approval; left pending on purpose.

elements.text: Status: *Pending Approval*  ·  Payroll cutoff: Wed 5:00 PM CT
